targets.rawSql:
WITH weeks AS (
  SELECT week_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY week_date DESC) as rn
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT week_date FROM scorecard_financials) sub
),
base AS (
  SELECT f.metric_name, f.target_value, w.rn, f.value,
    CASE
      WHEN f.metric_name = 'Weekly Recurring Revenue' AND f.value > 15390 THEN f.value
      WHEN f.metric_name = 'Weekly One-time Revenue' AND f.value > 23075 THEN f.value
      WHEN f.metric_name = 'Accounts Receivable (over 90 days)' AND f.value <= 40000 THEN f.value
      ELSE -f.value
    END AS cv
  FROM scorecard_financials f
  JOIN weeks w ON w.week_date = f.week_date WHERE w.rn <= 8
)
SELECT
  metric_name AS "Metric",
  MAX(target_value) AS "Target",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=8 THEN cv END) AS "2/3",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=7 THEN cv END) AS "2/10",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=6 THEN cv END) AS "2/17",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=5 THEN cv END) AS "2/24",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=4 THEN cv END) AS "3/3",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=3 THEN cv END) AS "3/10",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=2 THEN cv END) AS "3/17",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=1 THEN cv END) AS "3/24"
FROM base
GROUP BY metric_name, target_value
ORDER BY CASE metric_name
  WHEN 'Weekly Recurring Revenue' THEN 1
  WHEN 'Weekly One-time Revenue' THEN 2
  WHEN 'Accounts Receivable (over 90 days)' THEN 3
END

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT week_start, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY week_start DESC) as rn
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT week_start FROM scorecard_weekly WHERE section = 'sales') sub
)
SELECT
  CASE s.metric_name
    WHEN 'open_opportunities' THEN 'Open Opportunities'
    WHEN 'opps_closed' THEN 'Opps Closed Last Week'
    WHEN 'opps_won' THEN 'Opps Won Last Week'
    WHEN 'won_revenue' THEN 'Won Revenue ($)'
    WHEN 'open_opps_revenue' THEN 'Revenue on Open Opps ($)'
  END AS "Metric",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=8 THEN metric_value END) AS "2/10",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=7 THEN metric_value END) AS "2/17",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=6 THEN metric_value END) AS "2/24",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=5 THEN metric_value END) AS "3/3",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=4 THEN metric_value END) AS "3/10",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=3 THEN metric_value END) AS "3/17",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=2 THEN metric_value END) AS "3/24",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=1 THEN metric_value END) AS "3/31"
FROM scorecard_weekly s
JOIN ranked r ON r.week_start = s.week_start
WHERE s.section = 'sales'
  AND s.metric_name IN ('open_opportunities','opps_closed','opps_won','won_revenue','open_opps_revenue')
  AND r.rn <= 8
GROUP BY s.metric_name
ORDER BY CASE s.metric_name
    WHEN 'open_opportunities' THEN 1
    WHEN 'opps_closed' THEN 2
    WHEN 'opps_won' THEN 3
    WHEN 'won_revenue' THEN 4
    WHEN 'open_opps_revenue' THEN 5
END

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT week_start, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY week_start DESC) as rn
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT week_start FROM scorecard_weekly WHERE section = 'customer_service') sub
)
SELECT
  CASE s.metric_name
    WHEN 'open_tickets' THEN 'Current Open Tickets'
    WHEN 'kill_rate_7d' THEN 'Kill Rate Last 7 Days (%)'
    WHEN 'kill_rate_14d' THEN 'Kill Rate Last 14 Days (%)'
    WHEN 'sla_pct_30d' THEN '% SLA Met - Last 30 Days'
    WHEN 'total_hours' THEN 'Tech Actual Hours'
  END AS "Metric",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=8 THEN metric_value END) AS "2/10",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=7 THEN metric_value END) AS "2/17",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=6 THEN metric_value END) AS "2/24",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=5 THEN metric_value END) AS "3/3",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=4 THEN metric_value END) AS "3/10",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=3 THEN metric_value END) AS "3/17",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=2 THEN metric_value END) AS "3/24",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=1 THEN metric_value END) AS "3/31"
FROM scorecard_weekly s
JOIN ranked r ON r.week_start = s.week_start
WHERE s.section = 'customer_service'
  AND s.metric_name IN ('open_tickets','kill_rate_7d','kill_rate_14d','sla_pct_30d','total_hours')
  AND r.rn <= 8
GROUP BY s.metric_name
ORDER BY CASE s.metric_name
    WHEN 'open_tickets' THEN 1
    WHEN 'kill_rate_7d' THEN 2
    WHEN 'kill_rate_14d' THEN 3
    WHEN 'sla_pct_30d' THEN 4
    WHEN 'total_hours' THEN 5
END

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT week_start, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY week_start DESC) as rn
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT week_start FROM scorecard_weekly WHERE section = 'projects') sub
)
SELECT
  CASE s.metric_name
    WHEN 'open_projects' THEN 'Open Projects'
    WHEN 'budgeted_hours' THEN 'Budgeted Hours'
    WHEN 'actual_project_hours' THEN 'Actual Hours'
  END AS "Metric",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=8 THEN metric_value END) AS "2/10",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=7 THEN metric_value END) AS "2/17",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=6 THEN metric_value END) AS "2/24",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=5 THEN metric_value END) AS "3/3",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=4 THEN metric_value END) AS "3/10",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=3 THEN metric_value END) AS "3/17",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=2 THEN metric_value END) AS "3/24",
  MAX(CASE WHEN rn=1 THEN metric_value END) AS "3/31"
FROM scorecard_weekly s
JOIN ranked r ON r.week_start = s.week_start
WHERE s.section = 'projects'
  AND s.metric_name IN ('open_projects','budgeted_hours','actual_project_hours')
  AND r.rn <= 8
GROUP BY s.metric_name
ORDER BY CASE s.metric_name
    WHEN 'open_projects' THEN 1
    WHEN 'budgeted_hours' THEN 2
    WHEN 'actual_project_hours' THEN 3
END
